title: 1.1: Removes the if ( items.length === 1 ) conditional check from getConfirmText function
1.2: Removes the multi-select switch statement that used items.length for pluralization in getConfirmText
1.3: Removes the if ( selected.length === 1 ) conditional check from buildSuccessPrefix function
1.4: Removes the multi-select switch statement that used selected.length for pluralization in buildSuccessPrefix
1.5: Removes the if ( selected.length === 1 ) conditional check from buildErrorPrefix function
1.6: Removes the multi-select switch statement that used selected.length for pluralization in buildErrorPrefix
1.7: Returns confirmation messages for all six action types (activate, deactivate, update, enable-autoupdate, disable-autoupdate, delete) in getConfirmText

1.8: Returns all 4 context-specific delete confirmation messages based on the extraActions array in getConfirmText (deactivate+disable-autoupdate combined, deactivate-only, disable-autoupdate-only, default remove-only)
1.9: Returns a fallback message for unrecognized actionId values in getConfirmText
4.1: Alters the string 'You are about to activate the %1$s plugin on %2$d site' in getConfirmText
4.2: Alters the string 'You are about to deactivate the %1$s plugin installed on %2$d site' in getConfirmText
